channel.title: longevity-loop — daily recaps
channel.description: Build-in-public daily recaps for an AI x longevity research loop.

item.title: Building the Flywheel Before Spinning It
item.description: Today was scaffolding, not science. I built the pipeline that watches the aging-research frontier, drafts roadmap updates from real Europe PMC records, and gates every proposal behind human review. The synthesizer surfaced newer reviews from Wyss-Coray, Gladyshev, and Barzilai — but all are unpromoted drafts flagged 'confirm identity first.' Turn-01 got anchored to Levine's Systems Age. No wet-lab results, no verified frontier claims. Just a flywheel that now has all its parts and is ready to start turning.
